title: Product Video Blog
description: Scripted, produced, and owned the video blog end-to-end. Became the 5th highest converting webpage, leveraged by BDRs across the sales cycle.

title: GTM Webinars
description: Executed four GTM product releases. Owned customer webinars, product emails, and internal enablement sessions. Created content across help center, social, & web. The first person to pioneer in-app comms in WalkMe's editor — tripling webinar signups.

title: Customer Case Studies
description: Repurposed collateral into LinkedIn carousels, blog content, and internal docs. Drove 15% quarterly growth in engagement across social platforms.

title: Product Overview
tagline: Great content that gives reps a story worth telling.
description: Created a high-impact one-pager. Equipped Business Success Managers with clear, confident messaging to pitch Fiverr Pro's premium offering.

title: Onboarding Conversion Funnel
tagline: UX journeys that convert interest into activation.
description: Built landing page, 7-email journey, and in-app prompts, driving an increase of +35% signups through a fully integrated onboarding funnel.

title: Sales Collateral
description: Communicates Fiverr Pro's value to business teams by connecting tools, features, and testimonials into one cohesive narrative.

title: Marketing Excellence Award
description: Led an internal content strategy turning 1,000+ employees into social media storytellers. Executed during WalkMe's IPO launch — one of the highest-visibility moments in company history.
